tweet: Claude 4 Opus just passed every benchmark I threw at it. Anthropic has genuinely built something extraordinary here.
Tried Claude 4 for the first time today and I'm speechless. The reasoning depth is unlike anything I've seen from any AI.
Claude 4 Sonnet is my new daily driver. It understands context across an entire codebase without losing track. Insane.
Anthropic's Claude 4 feels like talking to someone who actually read every book. The nuance in responses is remarkable.
Claude 4 Opus wrote a research paper outline that my advisor said looked publishable. I'm still processing that.
The way Claude 4 handles ambiguous prompts is genius. It asks exactly the right clarifying question instead of guessing wrong.
Claude 4 just refactored 3000 lines of legacy Python into clean modern code. Saved my team literally two weeks of work.
Switched from GPT-4o to Claude 4 and I'm not going back. The writing quality is on a completely different level.
Claude 4 Haiku is shockingly capable for its size and price. Anthropic nailed the speed-intelligence tradeoff.
Anthropic releasing Claude 4 with genuine long-context memory is the upgrade I've been waiting for since 2023.
Claude 4 constitutional AI approach actually shows in its outputs. It is helpful AND honest. Rare combination.
I asked Claude 4 Opus to critique my startup pitch deck. The feedback was sharper than most VCs I have spoken to.
Claude 4 understands Indian legal documents better than I expected. The localization is genuinely impressive.
Claude 4 is the first AI that makes me feel like I am thinking WITH it not just prompting at it.
Anthropic safety-first approach with Claude 4 gives me confidence to use it in sensitive workflows. Trust matters.
Claude 4 Sonnet is now powering our entire content pipeline. Quality went up costs went down. Dream scenario.
The extended thinking mode in Claude 4 is phenomenal. Watching it reason step by step before answering is genuinely educational.
Claude 4 caught a logical flaw in my dissertation argument that three professors missed. Incredible analytical depth.
Claude 4 Opus for creative writing is sublime. It maintains narrative voice and character consistency across chapters.
Anthropic just proved that you do not need to sacrifice safety for capability. Claude 4 is the clearest evidence yet.
Claude 4 is impressive but Anthropic pricing is still too steep for indie developers and small teams.
Claude 4 Opus hallucinated a court case citation with full confidence. Safety-focused or not this is still a real problem.
Disappointed that Claude 4 still refuses perfectly legitimate creative writing requests. The over-censorship is exhausting.
Claude 4 is great at reasoning but completely loses track in conversations longer than 30 turns. Memory is inconsistent.
Anthropic API rate limits are killing my production app. Claude 4 is brilliant but inaccessible at scale.
Claude 4 is too cautious. I asked it to write a villain dialogue and it added three disclaimers. Completely broke immersion.
Claude 4 sometimes gives answers that are politically cautious to the point of being useless. Where is the directness.
I compared Claude 4 vs GPT-4o side by side and Claude still struggles with structured data extraction tasks.
Anthropic keeps talking about AI safety but Claude 4 still leaks prompt structures if you push it the right way.
Claude 4 Haiku is too watered down. The quality drop from Sonnet is huge for anything requiring real reasoning.
Claude 4 refusal to engage with hypotheticals makes it useless for philosophy ethics research and academic debate.
The Claude 4 API documentation is genuinely confusing. Anthropic needs better developer experience investment.
Claude 4 Opus is slow. Beautiful outputs yes but I am not waiting 45 seconds for every response in production.
Anthropic releasing Claude 4 without a proper desktop app first was a weird choice. Product strategy feels off.
Claude 4 still does not support real-time web access natively. In 2025 this feels like a serious gap.
Claude 4 struggles with code in niche frameworks. Asked about a Rust async edge case and got a confidently wrong answer.
Anthropic positions Claude 4 as safer but will not publish full red team results. Transparency is selective at best.
Claude 4 sometimes formats responses beautifully but the actual substance is thin. Style over depth.
I tested Claude 4 math reasoning with competition problems. It fails on anything requiring true novel insight.
Claude 4 is amazing for Western English content but Hindi and Marathi support is still underwhelming for Indian users.
